title: Fumi Knox Oral History Transcript
creator: Manzanar National Historic Site
description: Please visit the California Revealed website to see the most complete and up-to-date version of this object: https://californiarevealed.org/node/513835 . Manzanar National Historic Site interviewed Fumi Knox about her family's experience during the incarceration of Japanese Americans during WWII. Knox was born in Manzanar. Her father, Kiyotsugu Tsuchiya, was the director of the Manzanar Visual Education Museum.
